title: Can I import markdown documents?

posts.author: valeriii (Valerie)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently evaluating Monday because we want to leave Clickup behind. Therefore I am checking import features from other apps. The import of tasks seems to be working somewhat (although Clickup’s import functionality was much much better to be honest…) but I cannot find how to import docs. We have extensive docs for some projects that I don’t want to copy and paste one by one.
Is there a way to import those?
Thanks
